g.text: 1 The viewport should always follow the cursor when recording

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: 2 When recorder isn't recording user can interact with the timelines

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: 2.1 User can zoom viewport, and viewport should follow the user cursor when zooming

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: 2.2 User can move viewport by x-axis

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: 3 Track Header should always be fixed on viewport on the left side

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: 1 When user start recording cursor should move to the current time on the timeline

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: 2 User can grab cursor and move it across the viewport

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: 3 Cursor should have red accent color

g.text: 1 User can grab the whole timeline including track header and move it on y-axis when touches dragging area

g.text: 2 Change trackheader title to another one

g.text: 1 Controllers should have three buttons: Stop recording, Start recording, Pause recording with nice icons

g.text: 1 Should show time that shows under the lines like in the real ruler

g.text: 2 Time should show different kind of time when zooming: seconds, minutes, hours, days
